content.text:
Based on my detailed visual inspection of the molecule, I can now identify all the neighbor atoms of C:32.

**Neighbor atoms of atom 32 (Carbon):**

| Atomic Index | Element |
|--------------|---------|
| 27 | N (Nitrogen) |
| 34 | H (Hydrogen) |
| 35 | H (Hydrogen) |
| 36 | H (Hydrogen) |

**geomconf_index:** 773

**Summary:**
Atom 32 is a carbon atom that forms part of a methyl group (CH₃) attached to the nitrogen atom (N:27). The carbon has four covalent bonds: one to nitrogen (N:27) and three to hydrogen atoms (H:34, H:35, and H:36). This structure is part of a sulfonamide-like moiety in the molecule.

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 32, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
